user.title: Simple Irrigation
user.description: Create the installation, then open Simple Irrigation in the sidebar to configure zones and schedule.

error.invalid_max_parallel: Maximum parallel zones must be at least 1.

run_zone.name: Run zone
run_zone.description: Starts a full manual run for one zone: pre-start outputs (if configured), then the zone for its Eco/Normal/Extra duration matching the current mode, then all outputs off.

zone_id.name: Zone ID
zone_id.description: Internal zone identifier from the installation (shown in diagnostics / panel).

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Target installation when more than one Simple Irrigation entry exists.

run_zone_with_duration.name: Run zone with duration
run_zone_with_duration.description: Runs a zone for a fixed duration in minutes, ignoring Eco/Normal/Extra column for this run.

duration_min.name: Duration (minutes)
duration_min.description: How long to run the zone (1–1440).

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Target installation when multiple entries exist.

run_due_zones.name: Run due zones
run_due_zones.description: Runs whatever is due now according to schedule (same idea as the Run due zones button).

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Target installation when multiple entries exist.

run_schedule_slot.name: Run schedule slot
run_schedule_slot.description: Starts the full sequence for one schedule slot immediately (pre-start, phases, then off)—same as “Run this slot now” in the panel.

slot_id.name: Slot ID
slot_id.description: Internal slot identifier from the installation (shown in diagnostics / panel).

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Target installation when multiple entries exist.

stop_all.name: Stop all
stop_all.description: Stops the current irrigation cycle and turns off zone outputs.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Target installation when multiple entries exist.

set_mode.name: Set mode
set_mode.description: Sets global watering mode (Eco, Normal, or Extra).

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Target installation when multiple entries exist.

set_zone_enabled.name: Set zone enabled
set_zone_enabled.description: Enables or disables a zone. Disabled zones are skipped in every schedule slot that lists them.

zone_id.name: Zone ID
zone_id.description: Internal zone UUID (keys under zones in Download diagnostics for this integration).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: When off, the zone is skipped for scheduled and slot runs until enabled again.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Target installation when multiple entries exist.

pause_until.name: Pause until
pause_until.description: Pauses automatic scheduled runs until the given date and time.

until.name: Until
until.description: Date and time when scheduled runs may resume.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Target installation when multiple entries exist.

clear_pause.name: Clear pause
clear_pause.description: Clears a scheduled pause so automatic runs can occur again.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Target installation when multiple entries exist.

config_panel.timetable_intro: Weekly watering schedule by zone. Times use your Home Assistant time zone; bars use the current mode (Eco / Normal / Extra), pre-start delay, and the same phase rules as a real run.
config_panel.timetable_empty_no_zones: Add zones on the Zones tab to see the timetable.
config_panel.timetable_empty_no_slots: Add schedule slots on the Schedule tab to see when zones run.
config_panel.entry_picker_lead: Pick an installation to edit zones, weekly schedule, and runtime options. Each entry is an independent irrigation plan.
config_panel.entry_card_desc: Configure zones, schedule slots, run order, and pre-start outputs for this controller.
config_panel.entry_picker_empty: No installations yet. Add the integration under Settings → Devices & services → Add integration, then search for Simple Irrigation.
config_panel.entry_picker_howto: Add another plan (e.g. spring / summer / another garden): use Settings → Devices & services → Add integration → Simple Irrigation. Each plan appears in the list above.
config_panel.general_preparing_hint: Pre-start outputs and delay before zones begin.
config_panel.general_scheduled_pause_hint: Scheduled pauses use Plan control below. They do not stop a run already in progress — use Stop here.
config_panel.general_plan_off_hint: This plan is turned off. No automatic runs will start until you enable it again.
config_panel.general_no_slots: No enabled schedule slots or no zones assigned yet.
config_panel.general_enable_plan: Enable automatic irrigation for this plan
config_panel.general_pause_active_hint: Scheduled runs are paused until {when} (local time). You can clear this below or use the simple_irrigation.clear_pause service with config_entry_id in automations.
config_panel.general_installation_name_desc: Shown in lists and helps you tell multiple controllers apart.
config_panel.general_pre_start_desc: Switches turned on before any zone runs (e.g. pump or master valve). Use the same entity IDs as elsewhere in Home Assistant; leave blank when not needed.
config_panel.general_pre_start_delay_desc: How long to wait after turning on pre-start outputs before zone irrigation begins. Gives the pump time to build pressure, fills main lines, and can reduce noise from air in the pipes.
config_panel.general_watering_mode_desc: Sets which per-zone duration column is used: Eco (shorter), Normal, or Extra (longer). You can also drive this from automations—for example when water tank level or outdoor temperature should pick Eco vs Extra—by calling the simple_irrigation.set_mode service with mode set to eco, normal, or extra (and config_entry_id if you have several plans).
config_panel.general_max_parallel_desc: How many zones may irrigate at the same time. Exclusive zones always run alone.
config_panel.zones_intro: Each zone has one or more outputs and run times for Eco / Normal / Extra mode. Attach zones to schedule slots on the Schedule tab. Use Edit to change one zone at a time. If you disable a zone, it is skipped in every schedule slot that includes it—handy to temporarily skip a zone when the soil is still moist.
config_panel.zones_intro_automation: From automations or scripts, call the simple_irrigation.set_zone_enabled service with zone_id (each zone’s internal UUID—the keys under zones in Download diagnostics for this integration) and enabled true or false. Pass config_entry_id when you have more than one Simple Irrigation installation.
config_panel.zones_err_zone_already_queued: This zone is already included in the current run.
config_panel.zones_err_zone_no_outputs: Add at least one output before running this zone.
config_panel.zones_field_name_desc: Label for this zone in the UI and schedules.
config_panel.zones_outputs_desc: One or more switches, helpers, or groups (same entity IDs as in Developer Tools). Type or pick from suggestions; add rows for several valves, or use one group entity.
config_panel.zones_runtime_desc: How long this zone runs when the installation is in Eco, Normal, or Extra mode.
config_panel.zones_behavior_desc: Disable a zone temporarily or restrict it to run without others.
config_panel.zones_exclusive: Exclusive (never runs in parallel with other zones)
config_panel.schedule_intro: Slots are weekly start times with an ordered list of zones. Use Edit on a row to change zones, order, and options. Link zones on the Zones tab first.
config_panel.schedule_dialog_new_hint: Create a recurring time, then use Edit on the row to set zones and save.
config_panel.schedule_name_optional_desc: A short label to recognize this slot in the overview and when picking a slot elsewhere.
config_panel.schedule_weekday_desc: Day of the week this run starts.
config_panel.schedule_local_time_desc: Start time in your Home Assistant time zone. Stored as 24-hour (HH:MM); the overview uses your profile time format (12-hour or 24-hour).
config_panel.schedule_err_empty_slot: Add at least one zone to this slot.
config_panel.schedule_err_no_runnable: No enabled zones to run in this slot.
config_panel.schedule_run_order_desc: Zones run in list order. Phase labels show how runs group: zones in the same phase start together when parallel rules allow; exclusive zones always run alone. Disabled zones are skipped at runtime and are not shown in a phase.
config_panel.schedule_all_zones_in_slot: All zones are already in this slot.
config_panel.schedule_create_zones_first: Create zones first on the Zones tab.
config_panel.status_intro: Summary of what the controller is doing. Reload the panel or switch tabs to refresh.
config_panel.status_manual_text: This cycle was started from the panel (“Run this slot now”) or a zone service, not from the weekly schedule timer.
config_panel.status_scheduled_text: This cycle was triggered by the schedule.
config_panel.status_idle_hint: When a run is active, this page shows whether it was manual or scheduled. manual_run in raw state is only true during a manual cycle.
config_panel.status_error_clear_hint: The message clears when a run finishes successfully, when you stop irrigation from the General tab, or when you use Clear error message there. It stays visible after a failed run until one of those happens. A Home Assistant restart after an interrupted run may set a recovery message.
